name: Succession of Tax Attributes in Acquisitions

eligibility.description: Applies to Section 332 liquidations and Section 368(a)(1) reorganizations (Types A, C, D, F, and G).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Acquiring corporations in specific tax-free reorganizations or liquidations can inherit and utilize the target company's tax attributes, including NOL carryovers, capital losses, and charitable contribution carryforwards.
